Author: Ninethirty77
Name: The Studium
Description: The Studium app is an essential companion app for all Studium Members.
Changelog:
Studium Crafters stock status:
- Shows missing or short materials as Out of stock once all FC chest sections are confirmed loaded.
- Keeps Open FC Chest for materials that still need FC chest data.
Punchline: An essential companion app for all Studium members.
